creator: seebs@plethora.net
text:
remote(5) says, in part:
	... the device to insure only one user at a time has

However, it means "ensure".  To insure is to run something curiously similar
to a protection racket; to make certain of is to "ensure", with an e.

Fix: 

Change "insure" to "ensure".
How-To-Repeat: 
man 5 remote
